preset_description: Dark = identity signal. Visual language expresses who the user is. Validator gets authority and weight (heavy dark). Mover gets minimal light with one dark CTA punch. Explorer gets all-neutral — open, spacious, no urgency.

brief.audience: Startups needing an AI-enabled design system

accent_tokens._note: Brand primary CTA color. Global — not per-preset. Two variants: button on a light/neutral section vs. on a dark section.

beats.name: Orientation
beats.rationale: Always first. For a Mover archetype at decision stage, this is a slim, direct hero that immediately establishes MODE as the AI-enabled design system built for startups, giving clear page context before driving toward the decision moment.

beats.name: Evidence
beats.rationale: Required at the decision funnel stage before Conversion. For the Mover archetype, this is kept tight — a focused block of key metrics and proof points (e.g., time saved, adoption stats, performance gains) that resolves any remaining doubt without slowing momentum.

beats.name: Decision
beats.rationale: Required at the decision funnel stage. Presents pricing and plan comparison clearly so the Mover can quickly evaluate and self-select the right tier. Direct, scannable, no friction.

beats.name: Conversion
beats.rationale: Must appear immediately before Recovery. A strong, singular CTA — start a paid plan — with urgency-appropriate copy. Positioned for the Mover to act decisively without scrolling further.

beats.name: Recovery
beats.rationale: Always last. Provides secondary paths (contact sales, explore docs, compare plans) and footer navigation for anyone not ready to convert immediately, ensuring no visitor hits a dead end.

sections.name: Navigation
sections.rationale: Global navigation — wayfinding and persistent CTA for the session.

sections.name: Hero
sections.rationale: Always first. For a Mover archetype at decision stage, this is a slim, direct hero that immediately establishes MODE as the AI-enabled design system built for startups, giving clear page context before driving toward the decision moment.

sections.name: Proof points
sections.rationale: Required at the decision funnel stage before Conversion. For the Mover archetype, this is kept tight — a focused block of key metrics and proof points (e.g., time saved, adoption stats, performance gains) that resolves any remaining doubt without slowing momentum.

sections.name: Pricing
sections.rationale: Required at the decision funnel stage. Presents pricing and plan comparison clearly so the Mover can quickly evaluate and self-select the right tier. Direct, scannable, no friction.

sections.name: CTA
sections.rationale: Must appear immediately before Recovery. A strong, singular CTA — start a paid plan — with urgency-appropriate copy. Positioned for the Mover to act decisively without scrolling further.

sections.name: Footer
sections.rationale: Page close — brand mark, minimal navigation, and legal.

page.reasoning: Decision stage conversion page requires minimal variant to 'strip nav_links, keep logo and single CTA only' — the persistent CTA in nav is the most converted element and must not be suppressed.

Decision stage with Mover archetype requires with-price variant because 'use when product-context.json has pricing data and the goal is to anchor the commitment' — Mover variant 'suppresses subhead and cta_secondary — one message, one action.'

slots.headline: Your design system finally knows why.
slots.subhead: MODE adds the semantic intelligence layer your component library is missing.

page.reasoning: Mover archetype variant 'suppresses sources and headline; pure metric impact' — 3-stat is the preferred default for high-impact metric clusters.

stats.label: From install to running intelligence layer
Archetype, funnel stage, intent state, context mode — resolved per component
Manual variants. The system decides by default.

page.reasoning: Decision stage conversion requires highlighted variant for recommended plan — Mover variant 'strips description; price and CTA only' to focus on conversion without friction.

slots.description: The full intelligence layer. Yours forever — no subscription, no lock-in.
features: Three palette presets, editable token dashboard
Next.js preview UI with palette overlays
Bring your own Anthropic API key

page.reasoning: Mover archetype requires 'strong headline, single CTA, no subhead' — centered variant provides terminal conversion action at section end without competing elements.

slots.headline: Ship smarter. Decide now.
slots.subhead: One payment. Full ownership. Running in under an hour.
slots.trust_signal: Lifetime access. No subscription. No vendor lock-in.

page.reasoning: Decision stage conversion page benefits from with-cta variant to 'recapture departing users on key conversion pages — use on pricing and signup flows.'
